achievements.title: Behave Yourself Today

achievements.description: Hit the bell in the Bell minigame at the Millennial Fair

achievements.description: Guzzle all 8 cans of soda in the drinking minigame at the Millennial Fair

achievements.description: Defeat Gato

achievements.title: Clairvoyant Protector
achievements.description: Rescue the girl's lost kitten without upsetting her

achievements.description: Win a Poyozo Doll at Norstein's Tent at the Millennial Fair

achievements.description: Win a cat at Norstein's Tent at the Millennial Fair

achievements.title: All the Friskies
achievements.description: Increase your amount of cat food at Norstein's Tent

achievements.title: You're the Piano Man!
achievements.description: Have a...wooly pianist play a tune

achievements.description: Acquire 10G through a self-depreciating act

achievements.description: Probe a bush in 600 A.D. for a surprise

achievements.description: Find and defeat a flock of flying enemies in the Guardia Forest of 600 A.D.

achievements.description: Defeat Yakra without a character dying (no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Bring Marle back to 1000 A.D.

achievements.title: A Fine Noble Man
achievements.description: Obtain a unanimous not guilty verdict at the trial
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter I
achievements.description: Find the Lode Sword in the Guardia Castle Jail
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Nothing But a Bucket of Bolts
achievements.description: Defeat the Dragon Tank without a character dying (no New Game Plus)

achievements.title: A Ruined World
achievements.description: Escape from the Chancellor and find yourself in an odd world

achievements.title: Being on Guard
achievements.description: Defeat the Guardian without a character dying (no New Game Plus)
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: On That Day
achievements.description: Find out the truth about what happened in 1999 A.D.

achievements.title: The Vestiges of Time
achievements.description: Happen upon the plans of a frail old man at Keeper's Dome
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: We Will Ride the Wind, Babe!
achievements.description: Beat Johnny in the Bike Race with a score of at least 1500 W.P. and claim your reward

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter II
achievements.description: Find the hidden Mid Ether in the Factory
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: When the Clocks Stopped
achievements.description: Reach the End of Time
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: In the End, the Future Refused to Change
achievements.description: After reaching the End of Time, but before entering Medina Village, get to at least the Nizbel round of the battle mode of Lavos before falling and witnessing a tragedy; level of all characters at or below level 12 and no New Game Plus
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Why Yes, I Will Bring It
achievements.description: Defeat the Heckran without initating its counterattack or replenishing MP (no New Game Plus)

achievements.title: On to Battle
achievements.description: Receive the Gold Helm from the commander at Zenan Bridge
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.description: Defeat the Zombor before Crono learns true magic double elemental techs, Robo has to be in the party, and no character deaths (no New Game Plus)

achievements.title: Keeping Tabs for Booty
achievements.description: Obtain a Magic Tab for exchanging a titillating picture

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter III
achievements.description: Find the Silver Stud and the Silver Earring in the Denadoro Mountains
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: No Blowing Wind Over Here!
achievements.description: Defeat Masamune without using Slash (no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Obtain the Masamune from the Denadoro Mountains

achievements.description: Defeat a Nu at the Hunting Ground and claim its unique reward

achievements.description: Find the Elixir in the Reptite Lair

achievements.description: Defeat Nizbel in the Reptite Lair with the use of single-target damaging techs and no deaths (No New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Revitalize the Masamune

achievements.description: Defeat Slash in the second round with the use of one-target damaging single techs and no deaths (No New Game Plus)

achievements.title: Magic of All Persuasions
achievements.description: Defeat Flea with the use of one-target damaging single techs and no deaths (no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Clear Ozzie's booby traps without getting hit, entering a battle or falling into a pit (starts when he first retreats after defeating Slash & Flea)

achievements.description: Defeat Magus with the use of single-target damaging single techs, no replenishing MP, and no deaths (no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Defeat Magus

achievements.description: Try to mend a falling out between family royalty with a special item, but for it to only get worse

achievements.description: Witness a reunion for a rescued merchant's son

achievements.description: Defeat Nizbel at the Tyrano Lair with the use of single-targeting damaging single techs and no deaths (no double or triple techs; no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Defeat the Black Tyrano without damaging Azala (no deaths; no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Run into a very enigmatic man in Zeal

achievements.description: Obtain all the secret treasure of Zeal

achievements.description: Acquire the White Mail

achievements.title: Shadowproof
achievements.description: Acquire the Black Mail
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.description: Acquire the Epoch

achievements.description: Defeat the Mud Imp without defeating his beast companions (no deaths; no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Defeat a Rubble or Turret to see those tech points fly!

achievements.description: Defeat Giga Gaia with the use of single-target damaging techs and not destroying the arms (no triple techs; no deaths; no fire and shadow-absorbing equipment on any active or reserve characters; no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Defeat the Golems in the Ocean Palace without letting them attack with elemental magic (no New Game Plus)

achievements.title: The Fall
achievements.description: Bear witness to a tragedy, both personal and globally

achievements.description: Defeat Magus in Antiquity (unlocks after post-battle cutscene)

achievements.description: Crash the Epoch into Lavos

achievements.description: Have Spekkio gift magic to all your party members, even if only in spirit

achievements.description: Witness Ozzie's demise

achievements.description: Defeat the Rust Tyrano before the countdown ends (no GreenDream or Lifeline; no New Game Plus)

achievements.title: Multicolored Spoils
achievements.description: Acquire the Rainbow Shell
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Defense in Our Time
achievements.description: Defeat Yakra XIII with Crono, Lucca, and Marle in your party (no Chaos protection; no Haste; no GreenDream or Lifeline; no deaths; no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Defeat Queen Zeal with Magus in the party (no GreenDream or Lifeline; no New Game Plus)

achievements.description: Finish the game either at the beginning or at the Ocean Palace

achievements.description: Defeat Lavos at the Ocean Palace and reach the Dream Team in a regular new game; level of all characters at or below level 45, no GreenDream or Lifeline

achievements.description: Defeat Frog Spekkio and claim his reward
